title: Sugar Cosmetics is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Sugar Cosmetics is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Sugar Cosmetics! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Sugar Cosmetics:
Sugar Cosmetics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sugar Cosmetics!
